channel.title: hkcert21 on tnychn
channel.description: Recent content in hkcert21 on tnychn

item.title: HKCERT CTF 2021: 回到十二歲 Scratch Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: This post is part of the HKCERT 2021 CTF series. This writeup is written by one of my teammates. Name 回到十二歲 (Scratch Tic-Tac-Toe) Tags misc Points 200 Difficulty ★★☆☆☆ Solves 86 (total of all four divisions) Release Date 2021-11-13 06:00:00 If you can beat me in the game I’ll give you the flag!

item.title: HKCERT CTF 2021: 因講了出來 Because I Said It
item.description: This post is part of the HKCERT 2021 CTF series. Name 因講了出來 (Because I Said It) Tags web Points 150 Difficulty ★☆☆☆☆ Solves 76 (total of all four divisions) Release Date 2021-11-12 13:00:00 If you can solve Rickroll in 2020, you will be able to solve it. Probably.

item.title: HKCERT CTF 2021: 純孩兒 BabyXSS
item.description: This post is part of the HKCERT 2021 CTF series. Name 純孩兒 (BabyXSS) Tags web Points 100 Difficulty ★☆☆☆☆ Solves 37 (total of all four divisions) Release Date 2021-11-13 02:00:00 Have you tried the infant XSS challenge in the training platform? If you did, then you can try out this BABY XSS CHALLENGE…
